mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (recipient_id, sender_id, type, post_id, comment_id, content, is_read, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{recipientId}, #{senderId}, #{type}, #{postId}, #{commentId}, #{content}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.type, n.sender_id AS senderId, u.nickname AS senderName, u.avatar AS senderAvatar, n.post_id AS postId, p.title AS postTitle, n.comment_id AS commentId, n.content, (n.is_read = 1) AS isRead, n.create_time AS createTime FROM notification n LEFT JOIN user_account u ON u.id = n.sender_id LEFT JOIN community_post p ON p.id = n.post_id WHERE n.recipient_id = #{recipientId} ORDER BY n.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = 0
